testcase.name: registerPageNegativeTest

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (556, 579). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.11' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [5089c5d949147c52c7d7f73d7a7ea03a, clickElement {id=f.6C9DFA25D24B2E0E684C546FB8D23A5B.d.C6E282FA9A7665B3921E09A5B80EEAE8.e.144}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\INNOVA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53605}, goog:processID: 12684, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53605/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (5089c5d949147c52c7d7f73d7a7ea03a)] -> xpath: //button[.=' Verify ']] Session ID: 5089c5d949147c52c7d7f73d7a7ea03a
